title: Pathfinder 2e Monster Bestiary Harvest Table
description: Harvest rewards organized by creature trait. PF2e entries reference existing Pathfinder 2e concepts or analogs; Homebrew entries are flavorful additions for campaign use.

usage_notes.check: Nature, Survival, Medicine, or the creature identification skill at the GM's discretion. Crafting may apply for processing components.

dc_by_rarity.unique: +10 to creature's level DC, often requiring specific tools or rituals

usage_notes.value_scaling: Multiply listed value by creature level / 5, minimum x1, for higher-level creatures.

harvest_items.name: Aberrant Flesh
harvest_items.use: Alchemical reagent for mutagens and unstable potions; spoils in 1 week.

harvesting_rules.time_per_creature: 10 minutes per creature size category (Tiny=10min, Medium=10min, Large=20min, Huge=30min, Gargantuan=60min)
harvesting_rules.tool_required: A bladed tool such as a dagger, butcher knife, or harvesting kit. Without proper tools, take a -2 to checks.
harvesting_rules.freshness: Most components spoil within 1d4 days unless preserved with salt, magic, or alchemical preservative.
harvesting_rules.skill_check: Make a single harvest check against the creature's harvest DC. Critical success yields extra components; critical failure renders the corpse useless.
harvesting_rules.moral_considerations: Harvesting humanoids, celestials, fey, and other sapient creatures can carry social and karmic consequences.

preservation.preserved: Full value with proper preservation kit

tools_recommended.name: Preservation Salts
tools_recommended.use: Preserves up to 5 Bulk of components for 1 week.
